title: TripDescriptor
description: An identifier that uniquely references a specific vehicle journey in a real-time transit feed.

tripId.description: GTFS trip_id of the trip being referenced

routeId.description: GTFS route_id associated with the trip

startTime.description: Scheduled start time of the trip in HH:MM:SS

startDate.description: Start date of the trip in YYYYMMDD format

scheduleRelationship.description: Relationship to the GTFS schedule (SCHEDULED, ADDED, UNSCHEDULED, CANCELED)

name.description: Short display name of the entity
